name: Leadership Council for a Cleaner Anacostia River

attributes.description: The purpose of the Leadership Council as stated in the Mayor’s Order is, “to utilize the knowledge and influence of its members to advise and support the District’s For a Cleaner Anacostia River project, and to address ongoing pollution to the river from sources in multiple jurisdictions, throughout the Anacostia River’s watershed.”
attributes.shortName: Leadership Council for a Cleaner Anacostia River
